overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi video game showing a character in a spacesuit ascending a long industrial staircase within a dimly lit underground facility. The character passes under a 'HEADQUARTERS' sign and enters a larger common area with wooden furniture and industrial machinery, featuring gritty stone walls and metal piping throughout.

events.description: character passes underneath illuminated 'HEADQUARTERS' sign mounted above the staircase
character reaches the top landing of the staircase and transitions to flat ground

agents.ego_description: walking steadily up the long industrial staircase with a backpack, moving through the dimly lit stone corridor

entered.detail: rough hewn stone and brick wall lining the left side of the staircase
textured stone wall with embedded pipes on the right side
red-painted metal handrail running along the left side of the stairs
red-painted metal handrail running along the right side of the stairs
large metal pipes and conduits running vertically along the right wall
illuminated metal sign reading 'HEADQUARTERS' mounted above the stairwell
fluorescent light fixtures hanging from the ceiling illuminating the stairs

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a long, narrow industrial staircase enclosed by rough stone walls and illuminated by overhead fluorescent lights. Red metal handrails line both sides of the wooden steps, while large pipes run along the right wall. The character passes under an illuminated 'HEADQUARTERS' sign as they climb steadily upward through the hazy, warm-lit corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: headquarters common area with seating and machinery

events.description: exits narrow stairwell into open headquarters common area with tables and industrial equipment

agents.ego_description: walking into the headquarters main hall, moving past wooden furniture toward industrial machinery in the background

entered.detail: wooden tables and chairs arranged as seating in the common area
large industrial pendant light with cage housing hanging from the ceiling
illuminated metal ventilation grate mounted on the right wall
large mechanical equipment and generators visible in the background
metal storage shelves with equipment along the right wall

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the stairwell into a wider headquarters common area with concrete flooring. The space features wooden tables and chairs, metal shelving units, and large industrial machinery in the background. A metal vent grate emits light on the right wall, while a large hanging pendant light illuminates the center of the room. The stone walls transition to a more open industrial layout with visible equipment and storage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous ascent from a narrow, enclosed industrial stairwell into a spacious headquarters common area. It begins with the character climbing wooden steps flanked by red metal handrails and large pipes, moving steadily upward through a hazy corridor of rough stone walls under fluorescent lighting. As the character passes beneath an illuminated HEADQUARTERS sign, the tight confines of the stairwell give way to a wider interior with concrete flooring. The scene then expands into a functional hub featuring wooden tables, chairs, and metal shelving, while the lighting shifts from the corridor's glow to the radiance of a large central pendant light and a glowing wall vent. Finally, the environment opens fully to reveal an industrial layout filled with heavy machinery and storage equipment against the gritty stone backdrop.
